name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.7.2: 3-issue bundle from #42 verify (closes #53 #54 #55) — ooxml-swift v0.13.5 path traversal hardening + multi-instance Header/Footer auto-suffix + updateAllFields coverage extensions. v3.7.1: update_all_fields header preservation (#42). v3.7.0: autosave Design B + insert crash hardening (#40 #41). v3.6.0: autosave/checkpoint/recover (#37). v3.5.x: keep_bak (#38), actor (#39), atomic-rename save (#36).
